Record every unproductive probe in failed_probes so it is never repeated, and tag claims VERIFIED(step N) or HYPOTHESIS.
You may call `action(actions)` more than once in one Python snippet if your search or control loop needs it, but stop immediately if a result reports `game_over`, `run_complete`, `level_completed`, or `done`.

- Recent findings: SPACE transforms white rectangle into purple-top/white-bottom split VERIFIED(step 3)
- Open questions: Does SPACE cycle? What is the goal?

- Strategy log: Clicked purple rectangle - only timer changed, no gameplay effect
- Failed probes: MOUSE on purple rectangle (ID=12) - no gameplay effect, MOUSE on bottom rectangle (ID=14) - no gameplay effect, MOUSE on top-left white rectangle (ID=2) - no gameplay effect
- Revise any item above immediately if `current_frame` or `history` contradicts it. Tag claims VERIFIED(step N) when the evidence is in `history`, otherwise HYPOTHESIS.
end of world model.
